title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Courses Without Teachable or Gumroad — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're in a country where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip are blocked or unavailable, selling digital products like courses can be a daunting task. Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, and Cameroon, among others, are often excluded from these popular platforms. You might feel frustrated and stuck, but don't worry, you have options. This post will explore two viable alternatives to Teachable and Gumroad, both of which don't require PayPal, making them perfect for creators in restricted countries. You'll learn how to sell courses without Teachable or Gumroad, and find a solution that works for your business.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's start with the basics. Teachable and Gumroad are well-established platforms for selling digital products, but they come with their own set of limitations, especially for creators in restricted countries. Teachable, for example, charges a transaction fee of 0% - 5% on every sale, and requires a PayPal account to receive payments. Gumroad, on the other hand, charges a 3.5% + 30¢ per sale fee and limits sales to 50 products. Both platforms also have strict requirements for creators, including KYC (Know Your Customer) checks, which can be time-consuming and daunting for those operating in restricted countries. In contrast, NOWPayments and the Unchained Commerce suite offer a more flexible and cost-effective solution for creators, with no KYC requirements and lower fees.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, the current solutions often fall short. PayPal, for instance, blocks accounts from countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, making it impossible to receive payments. Teachable and Gumroad follow suit, limiting creators from these countries from selling on their platforms. However, Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard and NOWPayments provide a more inclusive solution, allowing creators from restricted countries to sell digital products without the need for a PayPal account. This means you can focus on building your business without worrying about country-specific restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce shine. With NOWPayments, creators can receive payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT, with no need for a PayPal account. This means faster payment processing and lower fees compared to traditional payment processors. Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard also offers real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easier to track your sales and identify areas for improvement.
With Unchained Commerce, you can sell digital products like courses without the need for a PayPal account, making it perfect for creators in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce depends on your specific needs and situation. If you're looking for a flexible and cost-effective solution with no KYC requirements, NOWPayments might be the better choice. However, if you need more automation and delivery capabilities, Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard and Core Shop Engine are the way to go. Either way, you'll be able to sell digital products like courses without the need for a PayPal account.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce offer a more flexible and cost-effective solution for creators, with no KYC requirements and lower fees compared to traditional payment processors.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more information on selling digital products without Teachable or Gumroad, you can also check out our Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Our Admin Dashboard, available for $29.99, provides transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics, making it easier to track your sales and deliveries. With Unchained Commerce, you can sell digital products like courses, ebooks, and software without the need for a PayPal account.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling digital products like courses without Teachable or Gumroad, follow these steps: Create an account with NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce; Set up your digital store with the Admin Dashboard and Core Shop Engine; Configure your payment options with NOWPayments; Test your payments and delivery capabilities; Start selling your digital products and track your sales with the Admin Dashboard.
By using NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard and Core Shop Engine, you can automate and streamline your digital store, making it easier to focus on selling and growing your business.
